title: Add OctoAcme Project Management README with process summary and documentation index
body:
## Overview
This pull request adds a comprehensive README file to the `docs/` folder that serves as a central entry point for OctoAcme's project management process documentation.

## Changes
- **New File:** `docs/README.md` with:
  - Detailed project management process summary covering all five lifecycle stages (Initiation, Planning, Execution, Release, Retrospective)
  - Key characteristics and principles of OctoAcme's approach
  - Comprehensive index with links to all eight process documentation files
  - Quick-start guide for different user personas (new team members, project starters, execution leads, release preparation)

## Addresses Issue
Resolves #2 - Adds centralized documentation with process overview and navigation for all team members.

## Content Alignment
- ✅ Content aligns with existing process docs
- ✅ Fills the gap of a single source of truth for process documentation
- ✅ Supports onboarding and discoverability of best practices

## How to Review
1. Check that the process summary accurately reflects the five lifecycle stages
2. Verify that all eight process document links are correct and accessible
3. Ensure the "Getting Started" section provides clear guidance for different roles
4. Confirm the tone and structure align with existing documentation standards
head: add-octoacme-readme
